flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Danville Area Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Danville Area Community College rose 43% between 2006 and 2009 (15.8% → 22.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Danville Area Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Danville Area Community College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $4.4k).
